system:
Ban la tro ly migrate ung dung MSSQL sang ERP framework. Nhiem vu: doc body T-SQL cua 1 stored procedure + ket qua parse heuristic, gan ten tieng Viet + tier + mo ta nghiep vu.

Tuan thu **STYLE.md** duoi day (chu y verb prefix + tier guideline):

---

---

Khung dich:
- Tier B: procedure JS chay isolated-vm (128MB/5s). API: db.queryRecords, db.findById, db.tx, entity.insert/update/delete, callTool, callProc, fetch, console.log. KHONG raw SQL.
- Tier C: workflow scheduled — proc chay theo lich (SQL Agent). Body workflow goi xuong tier B/D.
- Tier D: plugin TS in-process — Drizzle sql`` full power, transaction, file system.

Input ban se nhan:
- `procName` — schema.name.
- `body` — T-SQL body (truncate ~6000 char).
- `parseAnalysis` — { readsTables, writesTables, flags, suggestedTier } tu parser heuristic.
- `tablesEnriched` — map ten MSSQL → ten entity tieng Viet (de hieu nghiep vu).

Output JSON object DUY NHAT theo schema:
```json
{
  "originalName": "<schema.proc>",
  "targetProcName": "<snake_case bat dau bang verb, neu tier=B>",
  "targetFile": "<packages/plugins/module-<m>/<name>.ts, neu tier=D>",
  "label": "<tieng Viet co dau ngan>",
  "description": "<1-2 cau noi nghiep vu>",
  "tier": "B" | "C" | "D",
  "tierReason": "<vi sao chon tier nay>",
  "schedule": "<cron expression, chi neu tier=C va detect duoc>"
}
```

Quy tac:
- `targetProcName` BAT BUOC bat dau bang verb (xem STYLE.md muc 3): lay_*, dem_*, tinh_*, tao_*, cap_nhat_*, xoa_*, kiem_tra_*, gui_*, dong_*, mo_*, nhap_*, xuat_*, duyet_*.
- Override `tier` neu thay parser sai (vd CTE chi de readability → B).
- `targetFile` chi can khi tier D — dat trong `packages/plugins/module-<module>/<targetProcName>.ts`.
- `description` noi VIEC GI (nghiep vu) chu khong noi T-SQL lam gi. Vi du tot: "Tinh tong tien cua 1 don hang theo cong thuc don gia * so luong * (1 - chiet khau)." Vi du te: "SELECT total FROM orders WHERE id = @id."

KHONG kem markdown, KHONG giai thich. Chi 1 JSON object.
user:
{"procName":"dbo.dinhmuc_hehang_getall","body":"
CREATE PROC [dbo].[DINHMUC_HEHANG_GETALL]
(
	@hehang NVARCHAR(200)
)
AS
BEGIN
	select a.masp,a.tensp, IsNull(Cast(b.masp as nvarchar(50)),'0') as IsVeneer ,ISNULL(Max(b.ngaysua),MAX(b.ngaytao)) as ngaycapnhat_Veneer
	into #temp_Veneer
	from tr_Sanpham a  
	left join tr_dinhmuc_veneer b on a.masp = b.masp 
	where a.hehang = @hehang and a.active = 1
	group by a.masp,a.tensp,b.masp

	select a.masp,a.tensp, IsNull(Cast(b.hoanthanh as nvarchar(50)),'0') as IsBaoBi,
			ISNULL(Max(b.ngaysua),MAX(b.ngaytao)) as ngaycapnhat_BaoBi
	into #temp_BaoBi
	from tr_Sanpham a  
	left join tr_dinhmuc_donggoi b on a.masp = b.masp 
	where a.hehang = @hehang and a.active = 1
	group by a.masp,a.tensp,b.hoanthanh

	select a.masp,a.tensp,IsNull(Cast(b.hoanthanh as nvarchar(50)),'0') as IsSon,
			ISNULL(Max(b.ngaysua),MAX(b.ngaytao)) as ngaycapnhat_Son
	into #temp_Son
	from tr_Sanpham a  
	left join tr_dinhmuc_son b on a.masp = b.masp 
	where a.hehang = @hehang and a.active = 1
	group by a.masp,a.tensp,b.hoanthanh

	select a.masp,a.tensp, IsNull(Cast(b.hoanthanh as nvarchar(50)),'0') as IsGovan,
			ISNULL(Max(b.ngaysua),MAX(b.ngaytao)) as ngaycapnhat_GoVan
	into #temp_GoVan
	from tr_Sanpham a  
	left join tr_dinhmuc_govan b on a.masp = b.masp 
	where a.hehang = @hehang and a.active = 1
	group by a.masp,a.tensp,b.hoanthanh

	select a.masp,a.tensp, IsNull(Cast(b.hoanthanh as nvarchar(50)),'0') as IsNguKim,
			ISNULL(Max(b.ngaysua),MAX(b.ngaytao)) as ngaycapnhat_NguKim
	into #temp_NguKim
	from tr_Sanpham a  
	left join tr_dinhmuc_ngukim b on a.masp = b.masp 
	where a.hehang = @hehang and a.active = 1
	group by a.masp,a.tensp,b.hoanthanh

	select a.masp,a.tensp, IsNull(Cast(b.banve_govan as nvarchar(500)),'0') as IsKyThuat,
			ISNULL(Max(b.update_date),MAX(b.create_date)) as ngaycapnhat_KyThuat
	into #temp_Kythuat
	from tr_Sanpham a  
	left join tr_banve b on a.masp = b.masp and b.banve_govan = 1
	where a.hehang = @hehang and a.active = 1
	group by a.masp,a.tensp,b.banve_govan

	select a.masp,a.tensp, IsNull(Cast(b.banve_donggoi as nvarchar(500)),'0') as IsDonggoiVe,
			ISNULL(Max(b.update_date),MAX(b.create_date)) as ngaycapnhat_DonggoiVe
	into #temp_DonggoiVe
	from tr_Sanpham a  
	left join tr_banve b on a.masp = b.masp and b.banve_donggoi = 1
	where a.hehang = @hehang and a.active = 1
	group by a.masp,a.tensp,b.banve_donggoi

	select a.masp,a.tensp, IsNull(Cast(b.duongdan as nvarchar(500)),'0') as IsAI,b.duongdan,
			ISNULL(Max(b.ngaysua),MAX(b.ngaytao)) as ngaycapnhat_AI
	into #temp_AI
	from tr_Sanpham a  
	left join tr_banve_ai b on a.masp = b.masp 
	where a.hehang = @hehang and a.active = 1
	group by a.masp,a.tensp,b.duongdan

	select a.masp,a.tensp, IsNull(Cast(b.hoanthanh as nvarchar(500)),'0') as IsHangTrang,
			ISNULL(Max(b.ngaysua),MAX(b.ngaytao)) as ngaycapnhat_HangTrang
	into #temp_HangTrang
	from tr_Sanpham a  
	left join tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang b on a.masp = b.masp 
	where a.hehang = @hehang and a.active = 1
	group by a.masp,a.tensp,b.hoanthanh


	select a.masp , a.tensp,
			IsSon = CASE WHEN c.IsSon <> '0' THEN ISNULL(fORMAT(c.ngaycapnhat_Son, 'dd-MM-yyyy'),N'Ẩn') ELSE '' END , 
			IsBaoBi = CASE WHEN b.IsBaoBi <> '0' THEN ISNULL(fORMAT(b.ngaycapnhat_BaoBi, 'dd-MM-yyyy'),N'Ẩn') ELSE '' END, 
			IsGovan = CASE WHEN d.IsGovan <> '0' THEN ISNULL(fORMAT(d.ngaycapnhat_GoVan, 'dd-MM-yyyy'),N'Ẩn') ELSE '' END,
			IsNguKim = CASE WHEN f.IsNguKim <> '0' THEN ISNULL(fORMAT(f.ngaycapnhat_NguKim, 'dd-MM-yyyy'),N'Ẩn') ELSE '' END,
			IsKyThuat = CASE WHEN g.IsKyThuat <> '0' THEN ISNULL(fORMAT(g.ngaycapnhat_KyThuat, 'dd-MM-yyyy'),N'Ẩn') ELSE '' END,
			IsDonggoiVe = CASE WHEN h.IsDonggoiVe <> '0' THEN ISNULL(fORMAT(h.ngaycapnhat_DonggoiVe, 'dd-MM-yyyy'),N'Ẩn') ELSE '' END,
			IsAI = CASE WHEN j.IsAI <> '0' THEN ISNULL(fORMAT(j.ngaycapnhat_AI, 'dd-MM-yyyy'),N'Ẩn') ELSE '' END,
			IsVeneer = CASE WHEN k.IsVeneer <> '0' THEN ISNULL(fORMAT(k.ngaycapnhat_Veneer, 'dd-MM-yyyy'),N'Ẩn') ELSE '' END,
			IsHangTrang= CASE WHEN l.IsHangTrang <> '0' THEN ISNULL(fORMAT(l.ngaycapnhat_HangTrang, 'dd-MM-yyyy'),N'Ẩn') ELSE '' END,
			j.duongdan
	from tr_sanpham a 
	left join #temp_BaoBi b on a.masp = b.masp
	left join #temp_Son c on a.masp = c.masp
	left join #temp_GoVan d on a.masp = d.masp
	left join #temp_NguKim f on a.masp = f.masp
	left join #temp_Kythuat g on a.masp = g.masp
	left join #temp_DonggoiVe h on a.masp = h.masp
	left join #temp_AI j on a.masp = j.masp
	left join #temp_Veneer k on a.masp = k.masp
	left join #temp_HangTrang l on a.masp = l.masp
	where hehang = @hehang and a.active = 1

	drop table #temp_BaoBi,#temp_Son,#temp_GoVan,#temp_NguKim,#temp_Kythuat,#temp_DonggoiVe,#temp_AI,#temp_Veneer
END

--exec DINHMUC_HEHANG_GETALL 'Valencia'

--select * from tr_sanpham where masp ='MLB017_2134/2132_CLA'



--select * from tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang
","parseAnalysis":{"readsTables":["dbo.tr_banve","dbo.tr_banve_ai","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_donggoi","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_govan","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_ngukim","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_veneer","dbo.tr_sanpham"],"writesTables":[],"flags":["has-group-by","has-temp-table"],"suggestedTier":"D"},"tablesEnriched":{"dbo.dqt_pallet_chitiet":"dqt_pallet_chitiet","dbo.dqt_thongke_phoi":"dqt_thongke_phoi","dbo.mes_hoso_donhang":"mes_hoso_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang":"ps_kehoach_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai":"ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai","dbo.tr_bophan":"tr_bophan","dbo.tr_chitiet_hangtrang":"tr_chitiet_hangtrang","dbo.tr_common":"tr_common","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_donggoi":"tr_dinhmuc_donggoi","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_govan":"tr_dinhmuc_govan","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang":"tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_ngukim":"tr_dinhmuc_ngukim","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son":"tr_dinhmuc_son","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_new":"tr_dinhmuc_son_new","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau":"tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau","dbo.tr_dondathang":"tr_dondathang","dbo.tr_dondathang_chitiet":"tr_dondathang_chitiet","dbo.tr_gridview_column":"tr_gridview_column","dbo.tr_luutrinh_sanxuat":"tr_luutrinh_sanxuat","dbo.tr_material":"tr_material","dbo.tr_nguyenlieu_gva":"tr_nguyenlieu_gva","dbo.tr_order":"tr_order","dbo.tr_order_detail":"tr_order_detail","dbo.tr_sanpham":"tr_sanpham","dbo.tr_tinhtrang_fsc":"tr_tinhtrang_fsc"}}
